scripts.bundle:android: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run build:web-assets && npm run bundle:android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs :app:assembleDebug :wear:assembleDebug
scripts.build:android:release: npm run build:web-assets && npm run bundle:android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs :app:assembleDebug -x :wear:assembleDebug && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs :app:assembleRelease :wear:assembleRelease
